'''âb-s-j-k''' ('''kabasjekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beautify|beautify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-j-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beautify|beautify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-s-j-k
|-
! Lemma
| kabasjekoko
|}
